<MethodEndpoint
  method={"put"}
  path={"/v1/forms/{form_id}/sign"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Sign a company form. Company forms must be signed by the company signatory.

scope: `company_forms:sign`
